description: This pipeline thresholds an image. It starts with an input image, applies thresholding, and then outputs the thresholded image.

b7c1b866-23f6-4ebc-9df1-5513a0f912b1.name: ij1-transform-set-dimensions
b7c1b866-23f6-4ebc-9df1-5513a0f912b1.description: Sets the exact hyperstack dimensions of the incoming images. If you provide a lower size, planes will be removed. If you provide a larger dimension, planes are either set to black or copied from the slices with the highest index.

22a0db0d-f1c1-4b14-8ee6-bc59d2c143f5.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
22a0db0d-f1c1-4b14-8ee6-bc59d2c143f5.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

1f234adb-c7d5-451c-8851-ddfb8e15b785.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
1f234adb-c7d5-451c-8851-ddfb8e15b785.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
